name: Garza, Delia
evidence: Delia Garza, Travis County Attorney (since Jan 2021), former Austin City Council member (District 2) and Austin's first Latina mayor pro tem. FEC records confirm identity: Austin TX, employer 'Travis County'/'City of Austin', occupation Attorney/Council Member.

affiliations.snippet: FEC records show recurring Democratic giving: Greg Casar for Congress ($200-$500 multiple cycles), Castro for Congress, Harris for President, and ActBlue. No AIPAC/pro-Israel, oil/gas, gun, or defense PAC contributions found.

affiliations.role: Elected official (County Attorney; former Council Member/Mayor Pro Tem)
affiliations.snippet: First Latina on Austin City Council and first Latina Travis County Attorney; ran on criminal-justice-reform platform.

name: Valdes, Cristina
evidence: Austin REALTOR (active since 2001), works with the Corazon Team; NAHREP Top 250 Latino REALTORS. FEC records directly confirm employer 'Chancla Ventures' and 'Realty Austin', occupation Realtor, zip 78702.

affiliations.snippet: FEC records show consistent Democratic giving: Beto for Texas/America (up to $2,450), Jon Ossoff, Warnock for Georgia, Fair Fight PAC, Jaime Harrison, Obama for America. No AIPAC/pro-Israel, pro-Palestine, oil/gas, gun, or defense PAC contributions found.

affiliations.org: NAHREP (National Assoc. of Hispanic Real Estate Professionals)
affiliations.snippet: Recognized by NAHREP in the Top 250 Latino REALTORS nationally and #52 among Texas Latino agents.
